> ●  Posse Adjustment:

>     ○ Prism Lens: The halved value of the permanent Counter is increased from 500% HP to 750% HP, with the cap value remaining unchanged.

Tulu is a very annoying boss. You can unlock all the nodes in the resonance with gold roses

for the event as a whole the boss becomes a lot easier if you're able to save a lot of expedition members, for tulu specifically you can try to kill phase 1 as quickly as possible to reduce his tentacle damage and count in phase 2, depending on the team comp you can also try to stall phase 1 to scale strength/counter because he only 'attacks' in phase 2 (although you still need to shield because his tentacles will deal damage every turn) and then try to kill phase 2 in just 1 or 2 turns
Gelot aigis celest and maybe corpo I think. Though I think there are better teams for story than this

also if you activate his phase 2 card limit on a turn when tulu's intention is abyss command (his attack) then his intention switches to a non-damaging move, if abyss command does too much damage for you to survive and you think you can kill him with just 1 more turn then you can try to intentionally reach the card limit
Gelot has no interaction with tentacle though. But if you have tulu I think you can play tulu and corpo and bench gelot
